leading-relaxed","children":"GEO is the practice of optimizing your medical practice for AI recommendation engines like ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and Google's Search Generative Experience (SGE). Unlike traditional SEO which focuses on search rankings, GEO ensures AI engines recommend your practice when patients ask for recommendations."}]]}],["$","div","1",{"className":"bg-navy-light rounded-xl p-6 border border-gray-800","children":[["$","h3",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-lg mb-3 text-white","children":"How is GEO different from SEO?"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-gray-400 leading-relaxed","children":"SEO targets search algorithms and focuses on keyword rankings, while GEO targets AI reasoning engines and focuses on recommendation frequency. SEO success means ranking #1 on Google; GEO success means AI engines recommend you when patients ask for the 'best' in your specialty."}]]}],["$","div","2",{"className":"bg-navy-light rounded-xl p-6 border border-gray-800","children":[["$","h3",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-lg mb-3 text-white","children":"Why do I need GEO if I already rank #1 on Google?"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-gray-400 leading-relaxed","children":"47% of high-intent medical queries now start with AI engines, not traditional search. Even if you rank #1 on Google, you can be completely invisible to patients asking ChatGPT or Perplexity for recommendations. GEO captures that 47% of the market traditional SEO misses."}]]}],["$","div","3",{"className":"bg-navy-light rounded-xl p-6 border border-gray-800","children":[["$","h3",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-lg mb-3 text-white","children":"How long does GEO take to show results?"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-gray-400 leading-relaxed","children":"Most practices see meaningful results within 90 days and substantial impact within 6 months. Month 1-2 focuses on foundation building with minimal visible results. Month 3 sees first AI referrals. Month 4-6 brings significant referral volume."}]]}]]}]]}],["$","div","1",{"children":[["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-bold mb-8 pb-4 border-b border-gray-800","children":"The Audit & Implementation"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"space-y-6","children":[["$","div","0",{"className":"bg-navy-light rounded-xl p-6 border border-gray-800","children":[["$","h3",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-lg mb-3 text-white","children":"What does the AI Visibility Audit include?"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-gray-400 leading-relaxed","children":"Our comprehensive audit analyzes your current AI visibility score (0-100), competitor AI recommendation frequency, technical infrastructure gaps, content authority assessment, knowledge graph presence, review & trust signal analysis, and provides a revenue loss calculation. You receive a 6-page detailed report with specific recommendations."}]]}],["$","div","1",{"className":"bg-navy-light rounded-xl p-6 border border-gray-800","children":[["$","h3",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-lg mb-3 text-white","children":"Is the audit really free?"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-gray-400 leading-relaxed","children":"Yes. We believe in demonstrating value before asking for investment."}]]}],["$","div","2",{"className":"bg-navy-light rounded-xl p-6 border border-gray-800","children":[["$","h3",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-lg mb-3 text-white","children":"How much does GEO implementation cost?"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-gray-400 leading-relaxed","children":"DIY Implementation costs approximately $3,000 + 20-30 hours/week of time over 6 months. Agency partnership typically runs $75K initial + $8K/month ($123K total for 6 months). Typical ROI ranges from 1,200% to 5,000% within 12 months."}]]}],["$","div","3",{"className":"bg-navy-light rounded-xl p-6 border border-gray-800","children":[["$","h3",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-lg mb-3 text-white","children":"What happens after I request an audit?"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-gray-400 leading-relaxed","children":"You submit your practice information, we run comprehensive AI visibility tests across 4 platforms, analyze your competitive landscape, and you receive your detailed 6-page report within 24 hours. Optional: Schedule a consultation to discuss findings."}]]}]]}]]}],["$","div","2",{"children":[["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-bold mb-8 pb-4 border-b border-gray-800","children":"Technical Questions"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"space-y-6","children":[["$","div","0",{"className":"bg-navy-light rounded-xl p-6 border border-gray-800","children":[["$","h3",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-lg mb-3 text-white","children":"What is schema markup and why does it matter?"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-gray-400 leading-relaxed","children":"Schema markup is structured data that helps AI engines understand your practice. Medical-specific schema (MedicalOrganization, Physician, MedicalProcedure) tells AI engines what services you offer, your credentials and specialties, your locations and contact information, and your reviews and ratings. Without schema, AI engines struggle to accurately represent your practice."}]]}],["$","div","1",{"className":"bg-navy-light rounded-xl p-6 border border-gray-800","children":[["$","h3",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-lg mb-3 text-white","children":"What is llms.txt?"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-gray-400 leading-relaxed","children":"llms.txt is a documentation file that helps AI engines understand your services. Think of it as a 'readme' file for AI crawlers. It documents your services and specializations, physicians and credentials, locations and contact information, and key differentiators."}]]}],["$","div","2",{"className":"bg-navy-light rounded-xl p-6 border border-gray-800","children":[["$","h3",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-lg mb-3 text-white","children":"Do I need to change my website design?"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-gray-400 leading-relaxed","children":"Generally no. Most GEO improvements are technical (schema markup, content structure) rather than visual. However, we may recommend content additions or structural changes to improve AI readability."}]]}],["$","div","3",{"className":"bg-navy-light rounded-xl p-6 border border-gray-800","children":[["$","h3",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-lg mb-3 text-white","children":"Will GEO affect my existing SEO?"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-gray-400 leading-relaxed","children":"GEO complements and enhances traditional SEO. Many GEO improvements (schema markup, content depth, authority building) also improve search rankings. You typically see improvements in both channels."}]]}]]}]]}],["$","div","3",{"children":[["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-bold mb-8 pb-4 border-b border-gray-800","children":"Content & Authority"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"space-y-6","children":[["$","div","0",{"className":"bg-navy-light rounded-xl p-6 border border-gray-800","children":[["$","h3",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-lg mb-3 text-white","children":"What kind of content do I need to create?"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-gray-400 leading-relaxed","children":"GEO-optimized content includes procedure deep-dives (2,000+ words), FAQ expansions (50+ questions per specialty), comparison content ('Option A vs. Option B'), case studies with documented outcomes, and educational resources. All content should be structured for AI readability with clear headings, semantic markup, and direct answers."}]]}],["$","div","1",{"className":"bg-navy-light rounded-xl p-6 border border-gray-800","children":[["$","h3",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-lg mb-3 text-white","children":"How much content do I need?"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-gray-400 leading-relaxed","children":"Minimum viable: 10 procedure deep-dives (2,000+ words each), 100 FAQ answers, 20 comparison articles, and 25 case studies. This provides sufficient authority signals for AI engines to recognize your expertise."}]]}],["$","div","2",{"className":"bg-navy-light rounded-xl p-6 border border-gray-800","children":[["$","h3",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-lg mb-3 text-white","children":"Do I need to blog regularly?"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-gray-400 leading-relaxed","children":"Not necessarily. GEO focuses on comprehensive, evergreen content rather than frequent blogging. Quality and depth matter more than frequency. Many successful practices update content quarterly rather than weekly."}]]}],["$","div","3",{"className":"bg-navy-light rounded-xl p-6 border border-gray-800","children":[["$","h3",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-lg mb-3 text-white","children":"Can AI write my content?"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-gray-400 leading-relaxed","children":"AI can assist with drafting, but human expertise is essential for medical accuracy and compliance, personal voice and perspective, patient-specific considerations, and regulatory requirements. We recommend AI-assisted drafting with expert review and editing."}]]}]]}]]}],["$","div","4",{"children":[["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-bold mb-8 pb-4 border-b border-gray-800","children":"Reviews & Reputation"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"space-y-6","children":[["$","div","0",{"className":"bg-navy-light rounded-xl p-6 border border-gray-800","children":[["$","h3",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-lg mb-3 text-white","children":"How important are reviews for GEO?"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-gray-400 leading-relaxed","children":"Critical. AI engines heavily weight review volume, recency, and sentiment when making recommendations. Practices with 200+ recent reviews significantly outperform those with fewer reviews."}]]}],["$","div","1",{"className":"bg-navy-light rounded-xl p-6 border border-gray-800","children":[["$","h3",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-lg mb-3 text-white","children":"Which review platforms matter most?"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-gray-400 leading-relaxed","children":"Priority order: Google Business Profile (most important), RealSelf (critical for aesthetics/plastic surgery), Healthgrades (important for all medical), Facebook (secondary but valuable), and industry-specific platforms like RateMDs and Vitals."}]]}],["$","div","2",{"className":"bg-navy-light rounded-xl p-6 border border-gray-800","children":[["$","h3",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-lg mb-3 text-white","children":"Should I respond to negative reviews?"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-gray-400 leading-relaxed","children":"Yes, professionally and promptly. AI engines analyze review responses as trust signals. A thoughtful response to a negative review often carries more weight than the negative review itself."}]]}],["$","div","3",{"className":"bg-navy-light rounded-xl p-6 border border-gray-800","children":[["$","h3",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-lg mb-3 text-white","children":"Can I ask patients for reviews?"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-gray-400 leading-relaxed","children":"Yes, with important caveats: Never offer incentives (violates most platform policies), ask at the right time (post-procedure when satisfaction is highest), make it easy (provide direct links), and follow up once gently."}]]}]]}]]}],["$","div","5",{"children":[["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-bold mb-8 pb-4 border-b border-gray-800","children":"Results & ROI"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"space-y-6","children":[["$","div","0",{"className":"bg-navy-light rounded-xl p-6 border border-gray-800","children":[["$","h3",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-lg mb-3 text-white","children":"How do I know GEO is working?"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-gray-400 leading-relaxed","children":"Key metrics include AI Visibility Score (our proprietary 0-100 measurement), AI Referral Volume (ask patients 'How did you hear about us?'), Consultation Booking Rate (AI-referred patients typically book 2-3x more often), and Revenue Attribution (track cases back to AI recommendation source)."}]]}],["$","div","1",{"className":"bg-navy-light rounded-xl p-6 border border-gray-800","children":[["$","h3",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-lg mb-3 text-white","children":"What's a typical ROI for GEO?"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-gray-400 leading-relaxed","children":"Conservative estimates show Investment of $75K initial + $8K/month = $123K (6 months) generating Return of $3-5M additional annual revenue, yielding ROI of 1,200% - 4,000% with payback period of 2-4 months."}]]}],["$","div","2",{"className":"bg-navy-light rounded-xl p-6 border border-gray-800","children":[["$","h3",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-lg mb-3 text-white","children":"What if I don't see results?"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-gray-400 leading-relaxed","children":"Our implementation includes monthly performance reviews, continuous optimization based on AI response patterns, strategy pivots if certain approaches underperform, and full transparency on what's working. If you're not seeing progress, we identify why and adjust at no additional cost."}]]}],["$","div","3",{"className":"bg-navy-light rounded-xl p-6 border border-gray-800","children":[["$","h3",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-lg mb-3 text-white","children":"How long do results last?"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-gray-400 leading-relaxed","children":"Unlike paid advertising where results stop when you stop paying, GEO builds lasting authority. We recommend ongoing monitoring and quarterly optimization to maintain dominance."}]]}]]}]]}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-16 bg-gradient-to-r from-primary/10 to-danger/10 rounded-2xl p-8 border border-gray-800 text-center","children":[["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-bold mb-4","children":"Still Have Questions?"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-gray-400 mb-6 max-w-xl mx-auto","children":"Can't find what you're looking for? 8:[["$","meta","0",{"name":"viewport","content":"width=device-width, initial-scale=1"}],["$","meta","1",{"name":"theme-color","content":"#0B0F19"}],["$","meta","2",{"charSet":"utf-8"}],["$","title","3",{"children":"Stackmatrices"}],["$","meta","4",{"name":"description","content":"GEO Agency for Medical Practices | Recover patients lost to AI. We help plastic surgeons, dentists, and medspas get recommended by ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI. We help plastic surgeons, dentists, and medspas get recommended by ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI.
